description: Istio service mesh monitoring dashboard covering traffic management, performance, errors, resource usage, control plane (Istiod), data plane (Envoy), and security metrics via Prometheus.
title: Istio Service Mesh Monitoring

widgets.description: Aggregate request rate across all services in the mesh.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Total Request Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of requests returning 2xx status codes. Values below 99% warrant investigation.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code >= '200' AND response_code < '300'

widgets.title: Success Rate (%)

widgets.description: Number of Envoy sidecar proxies connected to the Istiod control plane.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Connected Envoy Proxies

widgets.description: Request throughput per destination service in the mesh.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Service

widgets.description: Traffic flow between services showing source and destination pairs.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Source → Destination

widgets.description: HTTP request distribution by method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.).

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Volume by Method

widgets.description: Rate of new TCP connections being established through Envoy sidecars.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Connections Opened

widgets.description: Rate of TCP connections being closed. Compare with opened to detect connection leaks.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Connections Closed

widgets.description: Median request duration. 50% of requests complete faster than this value.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Duration P50

widgets.description: 95th percentile request duration. 95% of requests complete faster than this.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Duration P95

widgets.description: Average size of request bodies flowing through the mesh.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Size

widgets.description: Average size of response bodies. Large responses may indicate inefficient API design.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Response Size

widgets.description: Rate of server errors (500-599) indicating service or infrastructure failures.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code >= '500'

widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Rate of client errors (400-499) including auth failures and bad requests.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code >= '400' AND response_code < '500'

widgets.title: 4xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Rate of gRPC requests with non-OK status codes.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND grpc_response_status != '0' AND request_protocol = 'grpc'

widgets.title: gRPC Error Rate

widgets.description: TCP-level send and receive errors through Envoy sidecars.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Errors

widgets.description: Rate of TCP bytes received by destination services.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Bytes Received

widgets.description: Rate of TCP bytes sent by destination services.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Bytes Sent

widgets.description: Number of active connections from Envoy to upstream clusters.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Active Upstream Connections

widgets.description: Rate of configuration pushes from Istiod to Envoy proxies. Spikes indicate config changes propagating.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: XDS Pushes

widgets.description: Time for Envoy proxies to converge on new configuration after an XDS push.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Proxy Convergence Time

widgets.description: Trend of Envoy proxies connected to Istiod. Drops indicate proxy disconnections.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Connected Proxies Over Time

widgets.description: Rate of failed XDS pushes. Errors indicate config rejection by Envoy.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: XDS Push Errors

widgets.description: Requests grouped by Envoy response flag. Flags like UH (no healthy upstream) indicate routing issues.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Rate by Response Flag

widgets.description: Active connection pool to upstream clusters showing connection reuse efficiency.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Envoy Upstream Connection Pool

widgets.description: Request latency grouped by source workload to identify slow callers.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Request Duration by Source

widgets.description: Combined TCP throughput (sent + received) per destination workload.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Throughput by Workload

widgets.description: Rate of requests using mutual TLS. In a properly configured mesh, this should match total request rate.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'

widgets.title: mTLS Request Rate

widgets.description: Requests NOT using mTLS. Any traffic here in a strict mTLS mesh indicates misconfiguration.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND connection_security_policy != 'mutual_tls'

widgets.title: Non-mTLS Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of CSR requests to Istiod's built-in CA for workload identity certificates.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Certificate Signing Requests

widgets.description: Requests denied due to authentication or authorization policy violations.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster IN $cluster AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code = '403'

widgets.title: Auth Failures
